reason_for_decision: The article passes because it answers the low-light question directly while still keeping the larger detection-versus-interpretation trade-off intact.
strengths: The article answers the headline comparison without flattening thermal and visible imaging into interchangeable tools.
It keeps the distinction between detection utility and identification utility clear throughout the piece.
The closing guidance on assigning one channel to discovery and another to interpretation is operationally useful.
summary_assessment: This is a solid pass. The article is readable, decision-oriented, and avoids the common mistake of presenting thermal as a universal upgrade over visible imaging.
